productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men NBA Bold Yellow T-shirts
description: CompositionSet of two t-shirts that can be worn individually or together:Saffron yellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and NBA inspired graphic print on the chest Black long sleeves T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, long sleeves with the word "Lakers" on the left sleeve and appliqued NBA tab on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool on and off the court in this T-shirt duo from adidas. The Lakers inspired logo on the front and the NBA tabs infuses these tees with a strong dose of Basketball magic, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with jeans and sneakers for casual wear. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
